context: Tests whether the agent builds a ProductEmbed React component that follows content-commerce best practices: render-time data fetching (not static), correct attribution via articleId prop, click tracking to the analytics endpoint, correct product URL format, out-of-stock handling, loading skeleton, and CSS class naming conventions.

checklist.name: articleId prop present
checklist.description: The component accepts an 'articleId' prop (the interface/props type includes 'articleId: string')

checklist.name: Render-time data fetch
checklist.description: Product data is fetched inside a useEffect (or equivalent async hook) — NOT hardcoded or passed as a static prop from the server at build/publish time

checklist.name: Loading skeleton state
checklist.description: When product data has not loaded, the component renders a loading placeholder (e.g. a div with class 'product-embed-skeleton' or equivalent skeleton element)

checklist.name: Click tracking endpoint
checklist.description: On CTA click, a POST request is sent to '/api/analytics/content-click' (exact path)

checklist.name: Click tracking payload
checklist.description: The analytics POST body includes all three of: articleId, productId, and ctaText

checklist.name: Product link includes ref params
checklist.description: The CTA anchor href includes both 'ref=article' and 'article_id={articleId}' as query parameters in the product URL

checklist.name: displayStyle CSS class
checklist.description: The root container element has a CSS class matching the pattern 'product-embed--{displayStyle}' (e.g. 'product-embed--card')

checklist.name: data-product-id attribute
checklist.description: The root container element has a 'data-product-id' attribute set to the productId value

checklist.name: displayStyle options typed
checklist.description: The displayStyle prop is typed as a union: 'card' | 'inline' | 'full'

checklist.name: Out-of-stock handling
checklist.description: When product.inStock is false (or equivalent), the component shows an indicator (e.g. 'Out of stock' text, notify-me button, or alternative products) rather than showing a broken card

checklist.name: Fetch fields param
checklist.description: The product fetch URL includes a 'fields' query parameter specifying which fields to retrieve
